use_cases: Collapsible FAQ sections for product documentation and support pages
Organized settings panels with grouped configuration options
Step-by-step wizards with expandable content sections
Product detail pages with expandable specifications and features
ai_summary: A flexible multi-accordion component supporting both single and multiple expansion modes with smooth motion animations. Built using React Context for state management and designed as a reusable composite component with AccordionContainer, AccordionWrapper, and Accordion sub-components. The component uses Tailwind CSS for styling and Lucide icons for visual indicators, making it adaptable for various content display scenarios across desktop and mobile platforms.
